input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.5.1
            TITLE: the attachment of the impact attenuator to the anti intrusion plate or front bulkhead must

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.5.1: The attachment of the Impact Attenuator to the Anti Intrusion Plate or Front Bulkhead must
F.8.5.1 The attachment of the Impact Attenuator to the Anti Intrusion Plate or Front Bulkhead must 
be documented in the SES submission

final_answer: The attachment of the Impact Attenuator to the Anti Intrusion Plate or Front Bulkhead must be documented in the SES submission
